It wasn't a surprise that Nikola cheated on you with daisy, it wasnt surprising at all for you, it was just annoying. You would always catch him texting a person who was giving him someome 'business offers', it definitely wasn't that person it was 100% Daisy. Then that night, you caught him in the act with daisy.
